case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVECES COLLECTION DIVISION VS THOMPSON RUSSELL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,078.38 FILED BY TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVECES COLLECTION DIVISION AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON RUSSELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
